---
title: ""
---

<!-- Google Fonts -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500&family=Playfair+Display:wght@500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
body {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  color: #333;
}

/* Hero links */
.hero a {
  color: #b45373;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.hero a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Content links */
.content a {
  color: #b45373;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.content a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Typography */
h1 {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
}

h3 {
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* Content spacing */
.content {
  line-height: 1.7;
}

/* News cards without images */
.news-cards {
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0 auto 64px;
  display: grid;
  gap: 14px;
}

.news-card {
  display: block;
  padding: 16px 18px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #f2cbd4;
  background: #ffffff;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  transition: box-shadow 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease;
}

.news-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}

.news-card strong {
  display: block;
  font-size: 1.05em;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.news-card span {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 6px;
  font-size: 0.9em;
  color: #666;
}
</style>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero" style="
  text-align: center;
  padding: 64px 20px 48px;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fdecef 0%, #ffffff 100%);
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f2cbd4;
  margin-bottom: 48px;
">
  <h1>Emily Roberts, PhD</h1>

  <h3>Assistant Professor of Biostatistics</h3>

  <p style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #555;">
    University of Iowa · College of Public Health
  </p>

  <p style="
    margin: 22px auto 0;
    max-width: 700px;
    font-size: 1.1em;
    color: #444;
  ">
    Developing statistical methods for clinical trials and causal inference,
    grounded in real-world collaboration.
  </p>
</div>

<!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
<div class="content" style="
  max-width: 780px;
  margin: 0 auto 48px;
  font-size: 1.1em;
">

  <p>
    Hi! I am an
    <a href="https://www.public-health.uiowa.edu/people/emily-roberts/" target="_blank">
      assistant professor of biostatistics at the University of Iowa.
    </a>
    I enjoy developing statistical methodology that can be meaningfully applied
    in clinical and public health settings. I am always interested in collaborating on clinical trials,
    causal inference, and beyond.
  </p>

  <p>
    I completed my PhD in Biostatistics at the
    <a href="https://sph.umich.edu/biostat/" target="_blank">
      University of Michigan
    </a>
    in 2022, where my dissertation focused on
    <em>Causal Inference Methods and Intermediate Endpoints in Randomized Clinical Trials</em>.
    Previously, I graduated Summa Cum Laude from Coe College with a BA in mathematics
    and psychology.
  </p>

  <p>
    Living with Type 1 diabetes since age four continues to shape how I approach
    research, teaching, and collaboration.
  </p>

  <p>

  </p>
</div>

<!-- FEATURED NEWS -->
<h2 style="text-align:center; margin: 56px 0 24px;">
  Quick News and Stories
</h2>

<div class="news-cards">

  <a class="news-card"
     href="https://www.public-health.uiowa.edu/news-items/roberts-to-lead-collaboratory-focused-on-causal-inference-research/"
     target="_blank">
    <strong>Roberts to Lead University of Iowa Causal Inference Collaboratory</strong>
    <span>University of Iowa · College of Public Health</span>
  </a>

  <a class="news-card"
     href="https://www.public-health.uiowa.edu/news-items/meet-our-faculty-emily-roberts/"
     target="_blank">
    <strong>University of Iowa’s Meet the Faculty</strong>
    <span>College of Public Health</span>
  </a>

  <a class="news-card"
     href="https://beyondtype1.org/nyc-marathon-phd-training-roberts/"
     target="_blank">
    <strong>Running Beyond Type One: My T1D and PhD Journey</strong>
    <span>Beyond Type 1</span>
  </a>

  <a class="news-card"
     href="https://www.coe.edu/why-coe/kohawk-stories/emily-roberts"
     target="_blank">
    <strong>Kohawk Stories</strong>
    <span>Coe College</span>
  </a>

</div>
